_comment: Tier-2 for skfem heat#: two LLM-trap claims surfaced via mcp__open-fem-agent__prepare_simulation. (a) ib.get_dofs() returns DofsView which is NOT subscriptable by string — dv['left'] raises TypeError 'object is not subscriptable'. Correct: ib.get_dofs('left'). (b) condense(K, f, x=..., D=D)'s x must be a FULL-size vector (length=ib.N), not just constrained values; passing a short array raises IndexError 'out of bounds'. Both claims were buried in the heat Template comment but absent from the pitfalls list. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 (skfem 12.0.1).
